goal: Bring the Celtic summary-box card names up to WCAG AA contrast
done: Override .full-integration-box__source color from #8a719f (~4.25:1) to #7a6090 (~5.38:1) in css/reading.css.
symptom: Card names in the full reading 'Your takeaway' summary box read faintly (~4.25:1, just under AA).
root_cause: styles.css sets .full-integration-box__source to #8a719f, ~4.25:1 on the near-white panel.
fix: Scoped override in reading.css (same specificity, loads after styles.css) to #7a6090, ~4.8-5.4:1, hue preserved.
verified: chrome-devtools-mcp edited file: contrast 4.25 -> 5.38, AA pass
affects: full reading summary box card names
notes: Footer 'Start ... Reading' links (~4.25:1, sitewide) still open. Mirror sync deferred (BUG-015).
